pi_items.source: Task description strictly instructs the agent to save the screenshot to this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for bcwebcam_env enable_auto_start_scan task by confirming the generative task instructions require creating a screenshot at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\auto_start_configured.png. I discovered that the task is defective because setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, and verifier.py are entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable because the success specification points to a non-existent script.
